title: Next-lap current-tyre pressure
summary: Create features that ask whether the current tyres cross a compound-life or finish-window boundary after exactly one more lap.
rationale: Several strong variants moved from generic current-state pressure to target-aligned one-lap-ahead pressure. This fits the target definition: the label is whether the driver pits on the next lap, not merely whether the current tyre is old.
implementation_hint: Using current-row values only, add one to `TyreLife` and reduce estimated laps remaining by one, then recompute compound-life ratio, signed finish margin, crossing flags, and late-race crossing flags for the hypothetical next lap without looking at future rows.
expected_effect: Small to medium ROC AUC gain with medium-high confidence; it should improve ranking near strategy thresholds.
risk: If `RaceProgress` is noisy, the boundary may be brittle; include continuous margins rather than only binary crossings.
